def solve(*args):
    if not args:
        return "No arguments provided"
    
    # Assuming args[0] is the event type and args[1] is the challenge ID
    event_type = args[0]
    challenge_id = args[1] if len(args) > 1 else None
    
    if event_type != "submission.scan.complete":
        return "Invalid event type"
    
    if challenge_id is None:
        return "Challenge ID is required"
    
    # Trigger Gitea workflows for the associated challenge
    # Placeholder for actual workflow triggering logic
    return f"Triggered Gitea workflow for challenge {challenge_id}"
